scripts.validate: npm run validate:dedirock && npm run validate:racknerd && npm run validate:ccs
scripts.refresh: npm run refresh:dedirock && npm run refresh:racknerd && npm run refresh:ccs
scripts.refresh:ccs: npm run scrape:ccs && npm run validate:ccs
scripts.refresh:dedirock: npm run scrape:dedirock && npm run validate:dedirock
scripts.refresh:racknerd: npm run scrape:racknerd && npm run validate:racknerd
